overall_shadow_history.note: This combines earlier shadow rows with the latest targeted probe pack. The strongest repeated disagreement remains concentrated around referral-needed phrasing near the routing edge.

referral_needed.assessment: Some evidence of possible improvement, but the disagreement is still concentrated in the narrow 'նեղ մասնագետի ուղեգիր է պետք' wording family, which sits close to stable routing behavior.

routing_arrangement.assessment: This bucket strongly supports leaving routing authoritative. Any live pilot must not steal this shape.

free_care_coverage.assessment: The shadow consistently prefers eligibility, which may indicate real improvement, but it also shows that this surface decomposes into a second boundary problem rather than one clean referral-status pilot.

why: The routing/arrangement bucket cleanly confirms that routing_specialist_referral_confusion_v1 must stay authoritative there.
The referral-needed bucket shows only a narrow repeated disagreement, not broad replay-backed evidence.
The free-care/coverage bucket points toward eligibility, which means the generic-specialist surface is not one simple adjudication problem.

what_is_still_missing: A larger generic-specialist replay set with more diverse referral-needed phrasings
A cleaner separation between referral-needed and entitlement-coded variants
A candidate live rule that improves referral-needed behavior without touching routing or free-care buckets

recommendation.next_work_item: continue offline replay/review for generic_specialist_process_residue only
do_not_do_yet: No broadening beyond the allowlisted family set
